Production site abhyuthanamind.com (Laravel 11 + Inertia/React) runs on Hostinger shared hosting (CloudLinux), deployed manually over SSH — NOT via Hostinger's GitHub auto-deploy (that fails on composer).

Key facts / gotchas (learned during first deploy, 2026-07-04)…
